name: PublicationType
title: DRKS Publication Type
description: Publication and document type codes for artifacts associated with a study registered in the DRKS.

concept.definition: A document representing the ethics committee vote for the study.
The study protocol document as submitted to the ethics committee or registry.
An abstract of the study, for example submitted to a conference.
A publication reporting the results of the study.
A publication or document that does not fit any of the defined categories.
A literature reference related to the study.
A basic reporting document fulfilling mandatory reporting requirements for the study.
An additional ethics committee vote, for example issued for a protocol amendment.
